name: GET /api/v1/account/seller/announcement/own/ - invalid token returns 401
description: Purpose: Verify that request with invalid token returns 401 (doc: not_authenticated)
descriptionHtml: Purpose: Verify that request with invalid token returns 401 (doc: not_authenticated)
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected 'not_authenticated' message_key, Got: {'message': 'Token is invalid or expired', 'message_key': 'token_not_valid', 'errors': {'detail': 'Given token not valid for any token type', 'code': 'token_not_valid', 'messages': "{'token_class': ErrorDetail(string='AccessToken', code='token_not_valid'), 'token_type': ErrorDetail(string='access', code='token_not_valid'), 'message': ErrorDetail(string='Token is invalid', code='token_not_valid')}"}, 'exception_class': 'InvalidToken'}
assert ('not_authenticated' in 'token_not_valid' or 'token_not_valid' == 'not_authenticated'
 +  where 'token_not_valid' = str('token_not_valid')
  
  - not_authenticated
  + token_not_valid)
statusTrace:
tests/account/seller/test_own_list.py:217: in test_invalid_token_returns_401
    assert "not_authenticated" in str(message_key) or data.get("message_key") == "not_authenticated", \
E   AssertionError: Expected 'not_authenticated' message_key, Got: {'message': 'Token is invalid or expired', 'message_key': 'token_not_valid', 'errors': {'detail': 'Given token not valid for any token type', 'code': 'token_not_valid', 'messages': "{'token_class': ErrorDetail(string='AccessToken', code='token_not_valid'), 'token_type': ErrorDetail(string='access', code='token_not_valid'), 'message': ErrorDetail(string='Token is invalid', code='token_not_valid')}"}, 'exception_class': 'InvalidToken'}
E   assert ('not_authenticated' in 'token_not_valid' or 'token_not_valid' == 'not_authenticated'
E    +  where 'token_not_valid' = str('token_not_valid')
E     
E     - not_authenticated
E     + token_not_valid)
